executeVerifiedMessage(address,uint64,by.details: Execute a verified message from the hub. Uses standard Groth16 verification with stored VK.

setVerificationKey(uint256[2],uint256[2].details: Set the Groth16 verification key. Must be called once after trusted setup before any proofs can be verified. Guardian-only.
